visual_identity:
Topic: The UK ISA allowance — £20,000 tax-free — permanently expires April 5. Every pou
Visual identity: extreme close-up bank statement paper texture, cold fluorescent overhead light, sharp downward shadows, numbers barely legible, cinematic 9:16 vertical, dark atmosphere, documentary realism, no faces, no people
Intended mood: 
Colour palette:

executed_well: Dark atmospheric mood with dusk/evening lighting suits financial urgency
Documents/papers visible on desk reinforce financial paperwork theme
No faces or people present as intended
City lights at dusk create some cinematic quality
failed_elements: Wide establishing shot instead of extreme close-up bank statement paper texture
Warm amber desk lamp light directly contradicts the intended cold fluorescent overhead lighting
Sharp downward shadows not present — lamp creates soft diffused warm glow
Numbers on documents not legible at all — too far away
Overall composition feels like a generic office/lifestyle shot rather than documentary realism focused on financial documents
Smartphone on desk is distracting and anachronistic to the intended sterile document aesthetic
Paper documents visible but not the focal point — camera too far back
Warm colour palette (amber, orange sunset) contradicts intended cold palette
Scene feels aspirational/premium rather than urgent/clinical
negative_prompt_additions: no desk lamps with warm glow
no sunset or dusk backgrounds visible through windows
avoid wide angle compositions showing full desk surface
